title: Journey planning on map view
excerpt: On a PC and from the map view it would be good to be able to search for accounts that are within a certain radius of a given postcode and then to be able to select several items for journey planning

posts.author: Belinda (Belinda Harris-Grave)
posts.cookedHtml: On a PC and from the map view it would be good to be able to search for accounts that are within a certain radius of a given postcode and then to be able to select several items for journey planning
